name: Walt
description: Walt is a kangaroo, the longest surviving neighbor in your town. Walt is a light grayish-blue kangaroo. He has a grey muzzle and belly, black nose, closed eyes, and thick black eyebrows. He has bandages on both forearms and a white scar under his left eye. His paws and feet are gray, and the insides of his ears are yellow. He's a little on the cranky side, but he means well.
creator: ZTNG
